title: Glitch Art Loop
summary: Retro-CRT VHS glitch effects on an abstract neon waveform - perfect for intros.
prompt: An abstract glitch-art animation: a bright neon waveform pulses across a black CRT-style screen with scan lines, then suddenly tears and shifts horizontally with chromatic-aberration RGB splits, datamoshing artifacts, and tracking distortion. Brief pixel-sorting bursts. Returns to clean waveform. 1980s VHS bootleg aesthetic, loops cleanly.
